comments.body: Looks like we need the openssl package installed on the linux box?
@mtrmac FYI ... let's see if we can get this green again
@mtrmac can we merge this PR to unblock the queue? We can continue investigating the permission error.

Let’s.

In #1096 I ended up with
```
cannot statx '/': Operation not permitted
```
and I have absolutely no idea what’s going on or how to debug that.

I’m worried that we will run into actually needing that kind of data sooner or later, but with no clear path to finding the root cause, it makes no sense to block.
